General.Name: Ausmon Resources Ltd
General.Description: Ausmon Resources Limited engages in the exploration of minerals tenements in Australia. It explores for base metals, such as copper, cobalt, nickel and zinc, and gold and silver, as well as rare earths elements. The company holds 100% interest in various tenements, including EL 8745, EL 8747, EL 9220, EL 9224, and EL 9230 located in NSW Broken Hill; EL 8954b and EL 9252 located in NSW Tumut; EL 6795, EL 6807, EL 6975, and EL 7015 located in SA Murray Basin; and EPM 29075 located in Turkey Hill. Ausmon Resources Limited was incorporated in 2008 and is based in Sydney, Australia.

1.Name: Mr. Wong Yuet Moye Sam Yue
1.Title: CFO, Company Secretary & Executive Director
